design_philosophy: Objective, strict, highly functional Swiss brutalism. Function dictates form. The SSO dashboard needs absolute clarity for IT admins to configure SAML/OIDC and test connections. No unnecessary decoration. High contrast ensures readability and focus.

mono.usage: Use for SAML metadata, XML keys, Client IDs, URLs.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Dense, strict alignment. 1px borders to separate widgets instead of heavy drop shadows.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. border-collapse for connected elements. rounded-none for a sharp brutalist feel.

cards.style: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

buttons.primary: bg-[#0051FF] text-white rounded-none font-bold hover:bg-[#003ECC] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0051FF] focus:ring-offset-2 transition-all px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-900 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-all px-6 py-3
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 rounded-none transition-colors px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-white border border-zinc-300 rounded-none focus:border-[#0051FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0051FF] text-zinc-900 placeholder:text-zinc-400 font-mono text-sm
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-zinc-900 mb-2 block

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-zinc-500 border-b-2 border-zinc-200 py-3

visual_enhancers.background_textures: For the login portal, use CSS repeating-linear-gradient grid lines to create a 'technical blueprint' feel. e.g. bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:24px_24px]
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Not used in this archetype. Prefer solid, opaque surfaces to maintain the Swiss aesthetic.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Stick to crisp 1px borders and small, sharp shadows if depth is strictly required.
visual_enhancers.animations: Micro-interactions only. 0.2s ease transitions for hover states. Minimal fade-ins for modal dialogs.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA and WCAG AA compliance. High contrast on all interactive elements.
accessibility.focus_states: All focusable elements MUST have explicit ring styles. focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0051FF] focus:ring-offset-2
accessibility.test_attributes: All buttons, inputs, tabs, and critical text elements MUST include data-testid attributes using kebab-case role-based names.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the login portal with the technical blueprint background.
Build the dashboard using a dense, control-room style grid layout.
Ensure all metadata output and SAML configurations use a monospaced font.
Create Shadcn UI-based configuration forms for SAML and OIDC setups.
Never use generic placeholder images; use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Ensure the UI uses high-contrast text and explicit hover/focus states.
Apply data-testid to every interactive element.
